source_jobs.description:
<p>The positions listed represent a broad palette of opportunity to join a business that is going places ­– literally. If you would prefer a different role to those listed here, or need time to think, or you’re not quite ready to make your move, keep an eye on this space. Our expansion throughout regional Australia means more and different positions will become available in the months to come.</p>
<p>Why not tell us a little about you. We may see a role that entirely suits your profile and ambitions and (naturally) will keep your contact it in strictest confidence.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><a href="https://www.dodgshunmedlin.com.au/careers?utm_source=greenhouse&amp;utm_medium=referral&amp;utm_campaign=people-like-us" target="_blank"><img src="https://www.dodgshunmedlin.com.au/assets/img/greenhouse/PeopleLikeUs_RGB_139.jpg" alt="People like us need people like you" width="139" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p></div>

notes: Agricultural and financial services company with no tech roles posted
